Quality Education.reason: The course is a graduate-level elective, directly contributing to tertiary education (Target 4.3). It aims for deep understanding of complex thought systems and critical analysis, fostering knowledge and skills for cultural appreciation (Target 4.7) and academic development (Core Competencies A-H).
